allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { \\$_.InterfaceDescription -like '*Realtek*' } | Format-Table Name, InterfaceDescription, Status")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -like '*Realtek*' } | Format-Table Name, InterfaceDescription, Status")
